display_text: Void Stone, Cost: 700: Purchasable component item that provides +1.75 Mana Regeneration, an essential source of mana sustain for spellcasters and heroes with high mana consumption. It serves as a common building block for more advanced mana-focused items. Stats: Bonus Mana Regen: +1.75.

display_text: Void Stone, Cost: 700: Its primary value lies in providing persistent mana regeneration to maintain spellcasting without requiring trips back to base. This is crucial for heroes who need to farm or fight constantly in the early to mid-game. Stats: Bonus Mana Regen: +1.75.

display_text: Void Stone, Cost: 700: Core building block for items requiring high mana upkeep, such as Orchid Malevolence, Scythe of Vyse, or Aether Lens. Often purchased first by supports or cores looking to solve early mana problems before completing their main items. Stats: Bonus Mana Regen: +1.75.
